problem: Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach?
mechanism: Forward osmosis using draw solution gradient
hypothesis: Combining Forward osmosis using draw solution gradient with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Field pilot deployment with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
